title: Conan Stories

memes.label: The People of the Black Circle
A Witch Shall Be Born
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story in which Conan, now king of Aquilonia, is overthrown by his twin witch-sister, crucified, and left to die — before returning to reclaim his throne.

memes.label: Acheron
memes.description: Ancient pre-Hyborian empire of dark sorcery that ruled much of the known world before its fall, remembered in Hyborian legendry as the realm of powerful magicians and demon-haunted ruins.

memes.label: Afghulis
memes.description: A warlike hill tribe of Afghulistan in the Himelian Mountains, whose chieftainship was held by Conan the Cimmerian in "The People of the Black Circle."

memes.label: Alafdhal
memes.description: The false identity under which Jungir Khan, satrap of Zamboula, is known while drugged and held captive by Totrasmek — a deception that drives the plot of Shadows in Zamboula.

memes.label: Apples of Derketa
memes.description: A deadly poisonous fruit native to the jungles of Kush, named for Derketa the Queen of the Dead — its juice kills instantly upon contact with skin or ingestion.

memes.label: Aquilonia
memes.description: The mightiest of the Hyborian kingdoms, a wealthy and powerful empire dominating the western world during the Hyborian Age.

memes.label: Aquilonians
memes.description: The Hyborian people of Aquilonia, the greatest and most powerful Hyborian kingdom of the western world.

memes.label: Aram Baksh
memes.description: The treacherous innkeeper of Zamboula who sells his guests to cannibal slaves, antagonist in "Shadows in Zamboula."

memes.label: Aratus
memes.description: A corsair in the crew of Sergius of Khrosha, who challenges Conan's claim to leadership in "Shadows in the Moonlight."

memes.label: Argos
memes.description: A maritime kingdom of the western Hyborian coast, rival of Zingara, known for its ports and sea trade.

memes.label: Arus
memes.description: Arus, a Nemedian priest of Mitra whose well-intentioned mission to civilize the Picts inadvertently armed them for the conquest that destroyed the Hyborian kingdoms

memes.label: Asura
memes.description: A deity worshipped primarily in Vendhya and the eastern kingdoms, whose priests practice a mystical faith centered on the purification of the soul and the preservation of the body's sacred integrity.

memes.label: Atlanteans
memes.description: An ancient race of the Pre-Cataclysmic Age, inhabitants of the lost continent of Atlantis, and the ancestors of the Cimmerians

memes.label: Baal-pteor
memes.description: A Kosalan priest and strangler of Yota-pong who serves as Totrasmek's servant and enforcer in Zamboula, killed by Conan during the rescue of Jungir Khan.

memes.label: Balthus
memes.description: A young Aquilonian frontiersman from the Tauran who joins Conan in the defense of Fort Tuscelan against the Picts in the wilderness of Conajohara.

memes.label: Bel
memes.description: Shemitish god of thieves, born in ancient Shumir and known as a trickster deity — "a good god" according to Conan, who learned of him during his years as a thief in Zamora.

memes.label: Bêlit
memes.description: Bêlit, the Shemite pirate queen known as the Queen of the Black Coast, captain of the Tigress and Conan's lover and partner in adventure

memes.label: Beyond the Black River
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story set on the Aquilonian frontier, where Conan fights alongside settlers and rangers against the Pictish hordes in a desperate border war.

memes.label: Black Coast
memes.description: The western coast of the Hyborian world, a lawless stretch of sea and jungle where pirates and raiders preyed upon shipping, famously ruled by Bêlit, Queen of the Black Coast.

memes.label: Black Kingdoms
memes.description: The collective term for the kingdoms of black peoples in the southern regions of the Hyborian Age world, including Kush, Keshan, Punt, Darfar, and Zembabwei.

memes.label: Black Lotus
memes.description: A psychoactive plant of the Hyborian Age whose juice is deadly poison and whose scent or ingestion induces vivid, prophetic dreams — used by the Stygian sorcerers and cultivated in the lost city of Xuchotl.

memes.label: Black Stone
memes.description: A mysterious sacred stone appearing in multiple Hyborian cult contexts — as the idol of Yezud's spider-god and as a sacrificial altar in the desert city of Zamboula.

memes.label: Book of Skelos
memes.description: A legendary tome of forbidden sorcerous knowledge, associated with Stygian magic and the dark arts of the Hyborian Age.

memes.label: Bori
memes.description: The legendary great chief later deified as the god of the Hyborian people, whom tradition held led them north during the Great Cataclysm

memes.label: Bossonian Marches
memes.description: The fortified border region between Aquilonia and the barbarian lands, home to the Bossonian archers.

memes.label: Bossonians
memes.description: A mixed Hyborian-aboriginal people inhabiting the Bossonian marches between Aquilonia and the Pictish wilderness, renowned as the finest archers of the Hyborian Age.

memes.label: Brythunia
memes.description: A northern-central Hyborian kingdom, source of mercenary soldiers, bordering Nemedia and Hyperborea.

memes.label: Brythunians
memes.description: The Hyborian people of Brythunia, a northeastern Hyborian kingdom adjacent to the Zamorian border, known for their slingers and their intermixture with the dark-skinned Zamorians.

memes.label: Cimmeria
memes.description: The grey, gloomy hill country north of Aquilonia, homeland of Conan and the Cimmerian people.

memes.label: Cimmerians
memes.description: A race of tall, dark-haired barbarians of the Hyborian Age, descendants of the ancient Atlanteans and the people of Conan himself

memes.label: Conan
memes.description: Conan of Cimmeria, the central protagonist of Robert E. Howard's sword-and-sorcery tales, a black-haired barbarian adventurer of the Hyborian Age

memes.label: Constantius
memes.description: Constantius, called "the Falcon," is the Kothic voivode of the Free Companies, a calculating and ruthless military commander who conspires with the witch Salome to usurp the throne of Khauran in A Witch Shall Be Born.

memes.label: Corinthia
memes.description: A region of semi-independent city-states in the central Hyborian kingdoms, known for its mercenary soldiers and trade.

memes.label: Corinthians
memes.description: The Hyborian people of Corinthia, a mountainous region of independent city-states lying east of Aquilonia between the Hyborian heartland and the eastern kingdoms.

memes.label: Dagon
memes.description: Ancient fish-god of the Hyborian world, associated with the pre-Hyborian Abyss and the entity Khosatral Khel — a dark deity whose name echoes the primordial depths from which elder horrors emerged.

memes.label: Dagozai
memes.description: A hill tribe of the Himelian Mountains serving as scouts and spies in "The People of the Black Circle," allied with the Irakzai mercenaries in the search for Conan and the Devi Yasmina.

memes.label: Darfar
memes.description: A southern Black Kingdom known for its cannibalistic cults and notorious thieves, situated south of Stygia beyond Kush.

memes.label: Darfari
memes.description: The black cannibal people of Darfar, a southern region bordering Stygia, known for their filed teeth and ghastly flesh-eating cults.

memes.label: Derketa
memes.description: The Shemitish goddess Derketa, Queen of the Dead, worshipped in Shem and Kush; associated with the deadly Apples of Derketa and the sanctuary of Dagon and Derketo.

memes.label: Derketo
memes.description: A Shemitish goddess worshipped alongside Ishtar, Ashtoreth, and Adonis in the Hyborian Age pantheon.

memes.label: Fall of the Hyborian Kingdoms
memes.description: The overthrow of the Hyborian civilization by combined barbarian invasions — Picts from the west and Hyrkanians from the east — that ended the Hyborian Age

memes.label: Free Companions
memes.description: Loosely organized bands of multi-ethnic mercenaries operating across the Hyborian kingdoms, with which Conan served as a soldier and hetman.

memes.label: Galzai
memes.description: A hill tribe dwelling in a village in the Himelian Mountains, featured in "The People of the Black Circle" when Conan and Yasmina encounter one of their women at a mountain well.

memes.label: Ghaznavi
memes.description: Chief counselor to Jehungir Agha, architect of the plan to lure Conan to Xapur in "The Devil in Iron."

memes.label: Gitara
memes.description: A servant girl of Vendhya whose love for the sorcerer Khemsa becomes the catalyst for his betrayal of the Black Seers of Yimsha, leading to her death at the hands of the Master of Yimsha.

memes.label: Golden Serpents
memes.description: Magical golden serpents of unknown power, guarding the crystal-ensconced doom of the Lords of the Black Circle, summoned from a far realm by the Master of Yimsha.

memes.label: Gorm
memes.description: Gorm, the Pictish chief who unified the scattered clans through iron-working and diplomacy, becoming the founder of the Pictish empire that eventually overthrew the Hyborian kingdoms

memes.label: Gorulga
memes.description: The high priest of Keshan, who seeks the Treasure of Gwahlur but falls victim to the temple's ancient guardian in "Jewels of Gwahlur."

memes.label: Great Cataclysm
memes.description: The world-shattering geological catastrophe that destroyed Atlantis and Lemuria, ended the Thurian civilization, and reshaped the world at the beginning of the Hyborian Age

memes.label: Green Stone
memes.description: An ironlike green stone found only on the islands of Vilayet, used in the construction of ancient cyclopean structures of unknown origin.

memes.label: Hanuman
memes.description: A simian deity worshipped in the lost cities of the Black Kingdoms, represented by a carven ape-mask and associated with dark altars in ancient, haunted ruins.

memes.label: Hyborian Age
memes.description: The fictional historical period conceived by Robert E. Howard as the setting for his Conan the Barbarian stories, chronicled in the essay "The Hyborian Age"

memes.label: Hyborians
memes.description: The dominant race/civilization of the Hyborian Age, whose kingdoms covered the western world from the northern steppes to the southern kingdoms.

memes.label: Hyperborea
memes.description: The oldest and most barbaric of the Hyborian kingdoms, located in the far north, known as the first Hyborian state.

memes.label: Hyperborean Age
memes.description: An era of Hyborian history dominated by the ancient kingdom of Hyperborea, the first and most enduring of the northern Hyborian civilizations, which persisted from the post-Cataclysmic settlement through the rise of the Hyborian kingdoms until its destruction by the Æsir.

memes.label: Hyrkanians
memes.description: A dark, generally tall and slender race descended from the Lemurians, who built the empire of Turan and were the great eastern rival of the Hyborian kingdoms throughout the Hyborian Age

memes.label: Irakzai
memes.description: A hill tribe of the lower villages in the Himelian Mountains, recruited as mercenaries by Kerim Shah in "The People of the Black Circle" for the assault on Yimsha.

memes.label: Iranistan
memes.description: A far eastern desert kingdom south of the Vilayet Sea, homeland of Kerim Shah, a nobleman secretly serving King Yezdigerd of Turan.

memes.label: Ishtar
memes.description: Shemitish goddess of love and fertility, widely worshipped across the Hyborian kingdoms; her worship was abolished in Khauran by the usurper Constantius.

memes.label: Jewels of Gwahlur
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story in which the barbarian, posing as a mercenary in the black kingdom of Keshan, seeks the legendary Teeth of Gwahlur while navigating rival treasure hunters, political intrigue, and a lost oracle.

memes.label: Jhebbal Sag
memes.description: Ancient nature god of the Hyborian Age, lord of beasts and animals, worshipped in primordial times when humans and animals spoke one language — his dwindling power persists through his scattered children.

memes.label: Jungir Khan
memes.description: The Turanian satrap of Zamboula who is drugged into madness by the priest Totrasmek — his lover Nafertari, disguised as the dancing-girl Zabibi, enlists Conan's aid to rescue him.

memes.label: Kerim Shah
memes.description: A Turanian agent in the service of King Yezdigerd, sent to Vendhya to sow discord and capture Devi Yasmina, becoming a rival to Conan during the events of The People of the Black Circle.

memes.label: Keshan
memes.description: A southern kingdom rich in gold and ivory, site of the Temple of Gwahlur, setting of "Jewels of Gwahlur."

memes.label: Khauran
memes.description: A small Hyborian kingdom ruled by Queen Taramis, setting of "A Witch Shall Be Born."

memes.label: Khemsa
memes.description: A sorcerer in the service of the Black Seers of Yimsha who betrays his masters for love of the servant girl Gitara, becoming an antagonist-turned-ally to Conan in "The People of the Black Circle."

memes.label: Khitan
memes.description: A mysterious people of the far east, known for their jade, indestructible silk, and caravans that traded luxury goods across the Hyborian world.

memes.label: Khosatral Khel
memes.description: An ancient pre-human demon of living iron who ruled the city of Dagon on Xapur, antagonist of "The Devil in Iron."

memes.label: Khrosha
memes.description: A port city in Nemedia, home of the pirate captain Sergius, who led the Red Brotherhood before his death at Conan's hands.

memes.label: Kosalans
memes.description: The people of Kosala, a kingdom in the far east whose priests served Yajur as ritual stranglers, and whose people favored the Afghuli hill tribes.

memes.label: Koth
memes.description: A major central Hyborian kingdom, one of the great powers of the age, often at odds with Aquilonia and Nemedia.

memes.label: Kozaki
memes.description: A brotherhood of Free Companions on the eastern steppes between the Vilayet Sea and the Hyborian kingdoms, formed of outlaws, escaped slaves, and deserters, whose hetmans included Conan the Cimmerian.

memes.label: Kush
memes.description: The northernmost of the Black Kingdoms, bordering Stygia to the south, known for its warrior culture and as a source of slaves.

memes.label: Kushites
memes.description: The black people of Kush, a vast southern kingdom bordering Stygia, whose warriors served as mercenaries, slaves, and eunuchs throughout the Hyborian world.

memes.label: Lemurians
memes.description: An ancient barbarian race of the Thurian Age who inhabited eastern island chains, survived the Great Cataclysm through enslavement, and eventually evolved into the Hyrkanians

memes.label: Magic in the Hyborian Age
memes.description: Survey of magical traditions, sorcerous practices, and supernatural forces in the Hyborian Age world, from cosmic sorcery to necromancy and the war-magic of tribal shamans.

memes.label: Muriela
memes.description: A Corinthian dancing-girl who impersonates the oracle Yelaya in "Jewels of Gwahlur," central to the story's deception plot.

memes.label: Nemedia
memes.description: A major Hyborian kingdom, perennial rival of Aquilonia and home to the Nemedian Chronicles.

memes.label: Nemedians
memes.description: The Hyborian people of Nemedia, the eternal rival of Aquilonia, known for their scholarship, intrigue, and stubborn independence.

memes.label: Nordheim
memes.description: The cold northern lands of the Hyborian Age, home to the golden-haired Æsir of Asgard and the red-haired Vanir of Vanaheim

memes.label: Nordic Drift
memes.description: The mass southward migration of Nordic tribes driven by advancing ice fields at the end of the Hyborian Age, which swept away the Pictish and Hyrkanian empires and laid the ethnic foundations of modern Europe

memes.label: Octavia
memes.description: Nemedian noblewoman held captive on Xapur, central figure in "The Devil in Iron."

memes.label: Olivia
memes.description: A slave girl from Ophir who escapes the cruel Shah Amurath and becomes Conan's companion during the events of Shadows in the Moonlight.

memes.label: Ophir
memes.description: A gold-rich Hyborian kingdom south of Nemedia, known for its fabulous wealth and as the setting for Conan's early adventures.

memes.label: Pictish-Atlantean Wars
memes.description: The series of bloody stone-age conflicts between the Pictish nation and the Atlantean clans that determined the fate of both races in the millennia following the Great Cataclysm

memes.label: Pictish Invasion of the Bossonian Marches
memes.description: The military campaign led by the Pictish chief Gorm that broke through the Bossonian frontier defenses and initiated the conquest of the Hyborian kingdoms

memes.label: Pictish Wilderness
memes.description: The vast, untamed western frontier of the Hyborian Age, homeland of the Pictish tribes and the source of constant pressure on Aquilonia's borders

memes.label: Picts
memes.description: A race of fierce, dark-skinned barbarian tribes dwelling in the western wilderness of the Hyborian Age, beyond the Bossonian marches

memes.label: Pre-Cataclysmic Age
memes.description: The era before the Great Cataclysm as named by the Nemedian chroniclers, essentially synonymous with the Thurian Age but emphasizing the Nemedian historiographical tradition

memes.label: Punt
memes.description: A southern Black Kingdom east of Keshan, hereditary enemy of Keshan and target of conquest by both Conan and Thutmekri in "Jewels of Gwahlur."

memes.label: Queen of the Black Coast
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story in which the barbarian joins the pirate queen Bêlit and becomes her lover and co-captain, only to face an ancient horror on a jungle island.

memes.label: Rise of Hyperborea
memes.description: The founding of the first Hyborian kingdom — Hyperborea — when a tribe of Hybori discovered stone architecture and transformed from nomads into castle-builders

memes.label: Salome
memes.description: Salome is the evil twin sister of Queen Taramis of Khauran, a witch marked from birth who was abandoned as an infant, learned dark sorcery, and returned to usurp her sister's throne in A Witch Shall Be Born.

memes.label: Sergius
memes.description: Nemedian corsair captain from Khrosha, rival and enemy of Conan in "Shadows in the Moonlight."

memes.label: Set
memes.description: The Old Serpent, arch-demon of the Stygian pantheon — a dark deity of serpent-worship whose cult dominated Stygia and whose influence extended across the Hyborian world through sorcerers, priests, and ancient pacts.

memes.label: Shadows in the Moonlight
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story in which Conan and the pirate Olivia are shipwrecked on an island of ancient ruins, only to face iron statues that come to life under the moonlight.

memes.label: Shadows in Zamboula
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story set in the lawless city of Zamboula, where Conan must navigate a night of terror as cannibal slavers hunt the streets and a beautiful woman seeks his help.

memes.label: Shah Amurath
memes.description: A Turanian lord of Akif who kept Olivia as his captive, pursued her after her escape, and was killed by Conan on the shores of the Vilayet Sea — the catalyst for Conan and Olivia's meeting.

memes.label: Shemites
memes.description: The dark-skinned, Semitic-descended people of Shem, known as skilled traders, archers, and worshippers of the Shemitish pantheon including Ishtar, Bel, and Derketo.

memes.label: Slasher
memes.description: Conan's loyal war-hound, a massive, silent, and deadly companion who fought alongside Conan and Balthus against the Picts during the defense of Conajohara, giving his life in a legendary last stand.

memes.label: Stygia
memes.description: An ancient, mysterious kingdom of the far south in the Hyborian Age, ruled by a dusky master race and centered on the worship of the serpent god Set

memes.label: Stygians
memes.description: The ancient, dark-skinned people of Stygia, masters of sorcery and worshippers of the serpent-god Set, whose civilization predated the Hyborian kingdoms.

memes.label: Taramis
memes.description: Taramis is the lawful queen of the small Hyborian kingdom of Khauran, the virtuous twin sister of the witch Salome. She is deposed, imprisoned, and impersonated by her evil sister in the story "A Witch Shall Be Born," only to be rescued by Conan and his allies.

memes.label: Tecuhltli
memes.description: One of the two warring clans inhabiting the lost city of Xuchotl in "Red Nails," dwelling by the western gate, who ally with Conan and Valeria against the Xotalancas.

memes.label: Teeth of Gwahlur
memes.description: A legendary treasure of Keshan, sacred jewels housed in the Oracle of Alkmeenon and sought by Conan, Thutmekri, and the kings of Zembabwei.

memes.label: The Devil in Iron
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian story in which the barbarian, serving with the kozaki on the Vilayet Sea, discovers a cursed island city ruled by the iron-bodied demon Khosatral Khel.

relations.label: The People of the Black Circle

memes.label: The People of the Black Circle
memes.description: A Conan the Cimmerian novella in which Conan battles the Black Seers of Yimsha to protect a Vendhyan princess bent on avenging her brother's murder by sorcery.
aliases: The People of the Black Circle (story)

memes.label: Thurian Age
memes.description: The prehistoric era and civilization that preceded the Hyborian Age, centered on the Thurian Continent and destroyed by the Great Cataclysm

memes.label: Thutmekri
memes.description: A Stygian schemer and adventurer who competes with Conan for the legendary Jewels of Gwahlur in the lost city of Alkmeenon in Keshan.

memes.label: Tiberias
memes.description: A merchant of Velitrium who is killed by Zogar Sag's swamp demon in "Beyond the Black River."

memes.label: Tlazitlans
memes.description: A mixed Stygian-blood tribe originally from the shores of Lake Zuad, who fled a failed rebellion into the southern jungles and conquered the ancient city of Xuchotl.

memes.label: Totrasmek
memes.description: High priest of the cannibalistic Hanuman cult in Zamboula, a sinister and manipulative figure who controls the city through religious terror and human sacrifice until his death at Conan's hands.

memes.label: Turanian Empire
memes.description: The dominant eastern empire of the Hyborian Age, ruled from the port city of Aghrapur and controlling the Vilayet Sea through its purple-sailed war galleys.

memes.label: Valannus
memes.description: Commander of Fort Tuscelan on the Pictish frontier, a young Aquilonian officer who dies defending the outpost in "Beyond the Black River."

memes.label: Valeria
memes.description: Aquilonian pirate of the Red Brotherhood, a fierce and independent warrior-woman who becomes Conan's companion in the lost city of Xuchotl during the events of Red Nails.

memes.label: Valerius
memes.description: Young Khaurani nobleman loyal to Queen Taramis, wounded by Constantius's mercenaries but survives to rescue the queen from the dungeon.

memes.label: Valusia
memes.description: One of the major pre-Cataclysmic kingdoms of the Thurian continent, mentioned alongside Kamelia, Verulia, and Grondar as a civilization that dominated the ancient world before the Great Cataclysm reshaped the earth.

memes.label: Vanir
memes.description: The red-haired Nordheimr people of Vanaheim, one of the two barbarian peoples of Nordheim alongside the yellow-haired Aesir of Asgard.

memes.label: Vendhya
memes.description: An eastern Hyborian kingdom ruled by the Devi, the kingdom of Yasmina, backdrop of "The People of the Black Circle."

memes.label: Vendhyans
memes.description: The people of Vendhya, an ancient eastern kingdom ruled by a Devi (queen), known for their wealth, mysticism, and struggle against the Black Seers of Mount Yimsha.

memes.label: Vilayet Sea
memes.description: The great inland sea of the Hyborian Age, separating the Hyborian kingdoms from the eastern lands of Turan and Hyrkania.

memes.label: Wazulis
memes.description: A hill tribe of the Himelian Mountains dwelling in the village of Khurum, led by chief Yar Afzal, involved in the tribal politics of "The People of the Black Circle."

memes.label: Were-beast
memes.description: A shape-shifting abomination encountered on the Black Coast — a "great hairy shape" produced through "godless alchemy" that attacks with blazing eyes and is vulnerable to moonlight-forged arrows.

memes.label: Winged One
memes.description: A flying abomination encountered by Conan on the Black Coast — one of the unnatural creatures produced by "godless alchemy" and associated with the Children of Jhil.

memes.label: Xapur
memes.description: A mysterious fortified island on the Vilayet Sea, site of prehistoric ruins and the resurrected city of Dagon ruled by the demon Khosatral Khel.

memes.label: Xotalancas
memes.description: One of the two warring clans inhabiting the lost city of Xuchotl in "Red Nails," dwelling by the eastern gate, locked in a generations-long blood feud with the Tecuhltli.

memes.label: Xuchotl
memes.description: Ancient decaying city deep in the southern jungles, setting of "Red Nails," built by a vanished pre-human race.

memes.label: Xuchotlans
memes.description: The original builders and inhabitants of Xuchotl, the walled city in the southern jungle, a lost race of mysterious origin whose civilization had already fallen into decay before the Tlazitlan conquest.

memes.label: Yasmina
memes.description: The Devi (queen) of Vendhya, a ruler driven by vengeance for her brother's murder, captured by Conan during her quest for justice against the Black Seers of Yimsha, and ultimately his ally in confronting the sorcerers who destroyed her family.

memes.label: Yezdigerd
memes.description: King of Turan, the expansionist monarch of the Hyborian Age's eastern empire who dispatches agents and sorcerers to extend his dominion over neighboring kingdoms including Vendhya.

memes.label: Yog
memes.description: A demon-god of the desert, known as the Lord of the Empty Abodes, worshipped by desert demons with fire and human sacrifice since "the beginning of happenings."
aliases: Yog Lord of the Empty Abodes

memes.label: Yuetshi
memes.description: A strange, primitive race of fisher-folk dwelling along the southern shore of the Vilayet Sea since time immemorial, featured in "The Devil in Iron."

memes.label: Zabibi
memes.description: A dancing-girl in Zamboula who seeks Conan's help against the priest Totrasmek — in truth Nafertari, the satrap's mistress, who has taken on a false identity to reclaim her lover Jungir Khan from the grip of sorcerous drugging.

memes.label: Zamboula
memes.description: A desert trading city on the western frontier of the Turanian empire, setting of "Shadows in Zamboula."

memes.label: Zamora
memes.description: An eastern Hyborian kingdom known for its dark-skinned people, thieves, intrigue, and the god Bel who guards the Tower of the Elephant.

memes.label: Zamorians
memes.description: The dark-skinned people of Zamora, a mysterious eastern kingdom known for its thieves, sorcerers, and ancient cities of spires and shadows.

memes.label: Zaporoska
memes.description: A river in the eastern steppes of the Hyborian Age, known as the territory and stronghold of the kozaki Free Companions under their hetmans.

memes.label: Zembabwans
memes.description: The people of Zembabwei, a great hybrid trading kingdom lying many days' march east of Keshan who sought to conquer Punt and seize the Teeth of Gwahlur.

memes.label: Zembabwei
memes.description: A great hybrid trading kingdom far to the east of the Black Kingdoms, ruled by twin kings who seek the Teeth of Gwahlur through conquest and political manipulation.

memes.label: Zingara
memes.description: A western maritime kingdom of the Hyborian Age, known for its seafaring tradition and plantation economy.

memes.label: Zingarans
memes.description: A dark-complexioned people inhabiting Zingara, the southwesternmost of the major Hyborian Age kingdoms, known as skilled mariners and traders.

memes.label: Zogar Sag
memes.description: Zogar Sag, a powerful Pictish wizard and war-leader who unites the Pictish clans against the Aquilonian frontier in "Beyond the Black River"

memes.label: Zuagirs
memes.description: A tribe of Shemitish nomads dwelling in the eastern deserts beyond the river from Khauran, who become Conan's fighting force in "A Witch Shall Be Born."
